brand_identity.name: Cornelia Trompke Consulting & Coaching
brand_identity.ethos: Quiet Power, Grounded Intelligence, Cinematic Luxury
brand_identity.visual_metaphor: Neural networks meeting high-end editorial fashion

scaling.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-[1.1]
scaling.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-[1.2]
scaling.caption: text-xs md:text-sm font-medium tracking-[0.2em] uppercase

usage_rules.headings: Use Playfair Display for all major headings. Avoid bold weights; rely on size for hierarchy.
usage_rules.body: Use Manrope for all functional text and long-form reading. Keep weights light (300) or regular (400).
usage_rules.quotes: Use Cormorant Garamond Italic for pull quotes and testimonials to add an editorial voice.

colors.gradients: NONE. Use solid colors or subtle radial gradients for lighting effects (e.g., a faint gold glow in the dark theme).

spacing_and_layout.vertical_rhythm: 120px - 160px between major sections. Do not fear empty space.
spacing_and_layout.text_block_width: max-w-[650px] to max-w-[750px] for optimal readability.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Avoid symmetric 3-column SaaS grids. Use 12-column distinct asymmetric layouts (e.g., col-span-5 offset-1).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align text by default. Center alignment ONLY for specific 'Impact' statements or hero tagline.

neural_network_bg.description: A slow-moving, interactive mesh network. Nodes are tiny, links are thin. Color: Soft Gold (#C8A96A) or White (#FFFFFF) at low opacity (10-20%).

textures.grain: Apply a fixed overlay of subtle film grain (opacity 3-5%) to the entire site to kill digital flatness.
textures.images: Use images with a 'matte' finish feel. Avoid high-gloss stock photos.

visual_enhancers.borders: Use ultra-thin borders (1px) with low opacity (10-20%) for dividers. No thick separators.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C8A96A] text-[#121212] px-8 py-3 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs hover:bg-[#E3DED7] transition-colors duration-500
buttons.secondary: border border-[#C8A96A] text-[#C8A96A] px-8 py-3 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs hover:bg-[#C8A96A] hover:text-[#121212] transition-all duration-500
buttons.link: text-[#F5F2EC] underline decoration-1 underline-offset-4 hover:text-[#C8A96A] transition-colors

cards.style: No shadow, no rounded corners. Sharp edges. Minimal border (1px solid border-white/10). Transparent background with backdrop-blur-md for 'glass' feel.
cards.hover: Subtle border color shift to Soft Gold. No lifting or scaling.

navigation.header: Sticky, glassmorphism (blur-md). Logo on left. Links on right. Language Switcher (EN/DE) distinct.
navigation.footer: Massive spacing. Editorial layout. Links in columns. Large 'Cornelia Trompke' branding.

motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Mandatory.
motion.reveal: Elements fade in and slide up (y: 20 -> 0) slowly (duration: 0.8s, ease: 'easeOut'). Stagger children.
motion.parallax: Apply parallax effect to images and the neural background.

images.style_guide: Black and white or desaturated editorial shots. High contrast. Abstract macro textures for backgrounds.
images.hero_bg: Abstract golden glowing lines on dark background (Neural Motif).
images.portrait: Professional senior executive woman, black and white, serious/calm expression.

tech_stack_instructions.components: Shadcn UI (Customize heavily - remove radii, change fonts)
tech_stack_instructions.icons: Phosphor Icons (Light weight) or Lucide (Fine weight)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast on dark backgrounds is at least 4.5:1. Use lighter greys than default for readability.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable Lenis and complex particles if prefers-reduced-motion is true.
accessibility.aria: Neural network canvas must be aria-hidden='true'.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds.
Do not center align the app container.
Use pill-shaped or sharp rectangular buttons, never default rounded.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
